summary: Stable Vendor Admin Page feature fully tested. All 20 backend API tests pass (100%). Frontend UI tests pass: vendor table with 17 vendors, search/filter/sort, detail drawer with all sections (summary, stability reasoning, check details, routing impact, quality signals, admin actions, override history), override CRUD operations, Dashboard 'View All' link, SharePoint Migration removal confirmed.

minor.resolution: FIXED - Added has_manual_override computation in get_vendor_detail service method

critical_code_review_comments: Vendor list endpoint properly supports search, status filter (stable/watch/unstable/overridden), sorting, and pagination
Vendor detail endpoint returns complete data: stability_checks, stability_reasons, routing_impact, quality_signals, override_history
Override CRUD works correctly: apply override (force_stable/force_watch/force_unstable), clear override reverts to system status
Override history properly audits all actions with timestamps, actors, and reasons
Effective status computation correct: force_stable→stable, force_watch→watch, force_unstable→unstable, none→system-derived
Safety constraint validated: document validation failures still route to manual_review even with force_stable vendor override
seed_data_creation: No seed data created - used existing 17 vendors in database
context_for_next_testing_agent: Stable Vendor Admin Page fully implemented and tested. 17 vendors exist, all currently 'unstable' (insufficient volume/rates for 50-doc minimum). Override system tested with apply/clear workflows. Override history collection: stable_vendor_override_history. SharePoint Migration module confirmed removed from sidebar and routes.

verified_endpoints.GET /api/stable-vendor/vendors: PASS - Returns vendor list with total count, supports search/status/sort/pagination
verified_endpoints.GET /api/stable-vendor/vendors?status=ov: PASS - Shows vendors with manual overrides
verified_endpoints.GET /api/stable-vendor/vendors/{vendor_n: PASS - Returns full detail with all sections
verified_endpoints.POST /api/stable-vendor/vendors/{vendor_: PASS - Reverts to system status, logs history

verified_ui_components.Stable Vendors page: PASS - Renders at /stable-vendors with 17 vendors table
verified_ui_components.Search input: PASS - Filters vendor list by name
verified_ui_components.Sortable columns: PASS - Score, Auto Rate, Resolution, Corrections sortable
verified_ui_components.Detail drawer: PASS - Opens on row click with all sections
verified_ui_components.Summary section: PASS - Shows effective/system status, score, docs, flag, last evaluated
verified_ui_components.Stability Reasoning: PASS - Lists reasons why vendor is/isn't stable
verified_ui_components.Check Details: PASS - Shows 5 checks with pass/fail icons
verified_ui_components.Routing Impact: PASS - Shows auto-ready/low-priority eligibility and blockers
verified_ui_components.Quality Signals: PASS - Shows layout families, alerts, correction patterns
verified_ui_components.Override Actions: PASS - Promote Stable/Set Watch/Demote buttons work
verified_ui_components.Clear Override: PASS - Visible when override active, clears correctly
verified_ui_components.Override History: PASS - Shows audit trail of all actions
verified_ui_components.Sidebar nav: PASS - 'Stable Vendors' link present and navigates correctly
verified_ui_components.Dashboard View All: PASS - Link in KPI card navigates to /stable-vendors
verified_ui_components.SharePoint Migration removed: PASS - Not in sidebar, /migration/onegamer-poc redirects to /

mocked_apis.note: All APIs are live. No mocked integrations.
